svg.title: IEEE B&W system architecture — three-layer block diagram
svg.desc: Black and white IEEE-standard block diagram: Layer I physical tank, Layer II ESP32 control, Layer III ML software stack with SNR output
svg.text: Layer III — Software and ML optimization stack
ΔSNR = SNR_ML − SNR_baseline [dB] | ΔSNR > 0 → ML gain confirmed
Fig. 1. System architecture: physical tank testbed (I), ESP32 control layer (II), ML software stack with ΔSNR output (III).
